message:
chore: remove stale SIMD template file

- Delete .metal0/logic_table_vector_ops_1766971541604.zig which contained
  hand-written SIMD templates that were NOT being used
- lib/vector_ops.a uses logic_table_vector_ops_compiled_1766975721224.zig
  which is REAL compiled Python for loops (verified by nm)
- This removes confusion between stale SIMD code and actual compiled Python
